sql_array: INSERT INTO timestamps (event_time) SELECT * FROM range(TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-02', INTERVAL '1 hour');
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = event_time + INTERVAL '2 hours' WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 12:00:00';
SELECT event_time FROM timestamps ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 10;
